penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion - task appears to transition to different exercises without completing peg transfer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows the initial peg transfer setup in frames 2-3, but then transitions to precision cutting (frames 4-5) and ligating loop tasks (frames 6-22). The peg transfer task was not completed within the observable sequence. Since this appears to be a demonstration video showing multiple FLS tasks rather than a single peg transfer attempt, and no completion of the peg transfer is visible, an incomplete task penalty is applied resulting in a score of zero.
